text.title: Contractor Agreement Template (US / UK / EU) Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example demonstrating the procedure and output contract.

example.title: UK contractor for a 6-week React engagement
example.code: Founder LLC engages a UK sole-trader frontend dev for a 6-week React engagement at GBP 500/day. Jurisdiction=UK, classification=outside-IR35 (substitution clause, no direct supervision, own equipment). Template: contractor-uk.md with IR35 mitigation. IP assignment: 'all work product assigned to Founder LLC upon payment' + UK-enforceable clause. Termination: 14-day notice. Risk flags: none after pass; routed to attorney for review before signature.
example.note: Every required field populated; rationale cites at least one input by name; owner is a single named handle; version + last_reviewed present.
